import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { api } from "../utils/api"; function ProgressBar({ pct }) { const cls = pct === null ? "" : pct >= 75 ? "mint" : pct >= 50 ? "warn" : "danger"; return (
); } export default function Dashboard() { const [data, setData] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { api.getDashboardStats().then(setData).finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); if (loading) return
